title: Iqaluit (Nunavut) - Canada.ca
content:
The Franco-Nunavut community is a proud and unifying community that shines through its cultural diversity. The languages spoken by Iqaluit residents are English, French and Inuktut (Inuktitut and Inuinnaqtun). This area offers many places and things to discover in a number of areas that support the local economy, including mining, arts and culture, tourism and green industries.
